scenarios.name: Menu Price Increase +3%, Volume -1%
scenarios.query: What if we raise menu prices by 3% starting month 2 but lose 1% of transaction volume?
scenarios.expected_note: Net revenue effect ~+2% (3% price - 1% volume). GM stays ~68%.

scenarios.name: Food Inflation Shock (3 months)
scenarios.query: Food costs increase by 4 percentage points (GM drops from 68% to 64%) for months 1 through 3 due to inflation, then revert to normal
scenarios.expected_note: Temporary COGS spike: 12.16M -> 13.68M for 3 months. Cash impact ~-4.56M.

scenarios.name: Wage Increase +6%
scenarios.query: What if payroll increases by 6% from month 1 onward due to minimum wage hike?
scenarios.expected_note: Payroll 11.4M -> 12.08M. Still cash-flow positive but margin compressed.

scenarios.name: New Store Openings (+3 stores)
scenarios.query: We open 3 new stores over 6 months: upfront capex of 18M spread across months 1-3, opex increases by 1.2M starting month 2, revenue ramp of +1M by month 6
scenarios.expected_note: Cash-negative initially due to capex, but should breakeven by month 8-10.

scenarios.name: Delivery Aggregator Push
scenarios.query: What if delivery share increases by 8 percentage points, GM drops by 2pp due to aggregator commissions, but revenue increases by 2% from more orders?
scenarios.expected_note: Revenue 38.76M but COGS rises. Net effect depends on commission vs volume.

scenarios.name: Bad Month Stress Test
scenarios.query: Revenue drops 12% for 1 month and waste increases (GM drops 1 percentage point to 67%)
scenarios.expected_note: Revenue 33.44M for 1 month. Tests cash buffer resilience.
